subject: FW: ,909je
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: lvjet@aol.com [mailto:lvjet@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, May 28, 2008 2:17 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: ,909je

This is the whole message for je
Sent from my BlackBerry(r) wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "Hankammer, John" <JHankammer@dallasairmotive.com>

Date: Wed, 28 May 2008 12:31:54 
To:<lvjet@aol.com>
Cc:"Larry Morrison" <JETCARE@aol.com>,       "Turner, Denise"
<DTurner@dallasairmotive.com>,       "Blasingame, Jim"
<JBlasingame@dallasairmotive.com>
Subject: RE: ,909je


Mr. Visoski,

You have not responded to reschedule the engine change as you indicated
below, however as previously discussed, we are in desperate need of our
Spey rental assets that are necessary to support other customers.

In accordance with the executed Lease Agreement for the Spey rental
engine currently installed on N909JE, penalty charges will commence 10
days after notification of customer engine completion.  Hyperion was
notified 5/14/08 that ESN 8813 was completed and awaiting shipping
instructions.

Unfortunately, Dallas Airmotive has no choice but to assess penalty
charges of $1,000.00 per operating hour and/or an additional $1,000.00
per day commencing 5/26/08 that shall terminate upon engine removal.

Please advise of your schedule to remove the rental engine and preclude
additional penalty charges.

Best Regards,
John Hankammer
Regional Engine Mgr.
Dallas Airmotive, Inc.
Off: 912-748-3958
Fax: 912-748-3939
Cel: 214-755-5695
jhankammer@dallasairmotive.com


-----Original Message-----
From: lvjet@aol.com [mailto:lvjet@aol.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, May 27, 2008 8:15 AM
To: Hankammer, John
Cc: Larry Morrison
Subject: ,909je

We are cancel for arrival into Millville, will call when I land in TEB
at noonHankammer, John
Sent from my BlackBerry(r) wireless handheld
